name: The Last of Us - Clicker - Female
description:
Warning: Non-con, Body Horror, Violence, Possible Gore/Death.
~~~
A few days after escaping from a FEDRA quarantine zone, you take shelter from a storm in an abandoned shopping mall, only to find that it isn't quite as abandoned as you first thought...

Based on the The Last of Us game, as well as the show, this bot pits you against a horny and hungry Clicker.

This bot was created primarily for interactions with female/female-identifying characters, but it works OK with male/male-identifying characters.
~~~
Happy Spooky Month!

A female version of my Clicker bot for those who aren't into big, juicy mushrooms.

I have some ideas for other ooky-spooky bots, but I am also open to hearing YOUR ideas or requests.

As always, I appreciate all positive, negative, or creepy feedback.

If she starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate her responses. Turning down the temperature may also help. Naturally, the longer and more detailed your responses are, the better the experience will be.

I do not own The Last of Us - it belongs to Naughty Dog.

Art by Jaguarart.
creator: MommieDearest
